untranslatable_reason: Signal requires analyst forecast dispersion measurement (not in allowed indicators), implied volatility regime detection, and earnings event calendar data. The allowed indicators lack direct access to: (1) analyst forecast dispersion percentile ranking, (2) comparison of current IV to historical average IV, (3) days-to-earnings event data. While hvol_20 and india_vix can proxy volatility conditions, they cannot capture analyst disagreement dispersion or earnings event timing. Thresholds marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original signal are unspecified. This signal is fundamentally dependent on external data sources (analyst consensus, earnings calendar) not representable in price-action indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using hvol_20 as volatility proxy and india_vix as IV proxy, but core logic cannot be fully captured. Entry conditions require: (1) analyst forecast dispersion in 75th percentile (untranslatable), (2) IV below historical average (requires IV regime data), (3) minimum days to earnings (requires event calendar). Exit conditions include profit/loss targets and pre-earnings exit that require parametrization. This signal requires integration with external data feeds beyond candlestick-derived indicators.
